title: secret: add support for `--ignore` with rm
body:
Refers #18591

```release-note
Add support for `--ignore` with `secret rm`
```

comments.body:
LGTM
Thanks @danishprakash 
/approve

Looks like you have some  more man page work.
@danishprakash looks like you've a real error somewhere in the gingko changes.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.

@danishprakash much better, thanks, but Go doesn't like mixes of spaces and tabs. Could you please run:
```console
$ gofmt -w -s test/e2e/secret_test.go
$ git commit --amend !$
```
And, just to prevent any silent conflicts, could you also please rebase onto current main?
```
$ git rebase main
```
Thank you for your patience!
